codex_visual_review_overall: manual visual review supports clean/rule single-anchor positives and DiffSBDD invalid/multi reconnect failures; vqc_009 and vqc_019 are confirmed disconnected/invalid reconnect by image plus RDKit fragment-count evidence, and vqc_018 is confirmed multi_attachment_out_of_scope by user visual review.
visual_qc_closeout_recommendation: phase4.0.1a is closeable from visual QC perspective; no remaining mandatory visual QC review cases, final report still waits for user/web ChatGPT discussion.
rule_update_note: ligand_valid means RDKit sanitize validity; candidate_single_fragment=false or candidate_total_fragment_count > 1 is now classified as invalid_reconnect before multi-attachment checks.
ligand_valid_semantics: RDKit sanitize validity only; not equivalent to single connected ligand candidate validity.
candidate_fragment_priority: candidate_single_fragment=false or candidate_total_fragment_count > 1 is classified as invalid_reconnect before multi-attachment checks.
